name: Process Killer
description: Lists processes by name and kills specified ones
author: AgentOS

steps.description: List top processes by memory usage
steps.command: Get-Process | Sort-Object WorkingSet64 -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Name, Id, @{N='RAM(MB)';E={[math]::Round($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,1)}}, CPU | Format-Table -AutoSize

steps.description: Kill a process by name (replace 'notepad' with target)
steps.command: # To kill a process: Stop-Process -Name 'notepad' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output 'Specify a process name to kill'
